title: audit4me event (v1)
description: Single line of .code4me/audit4me/audit-events.jsonl — the append-only history of every (vendor × file × category × run) audit pass. Source of truth; audit-coverage.json is derivable from this stream.

ts.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when this audit pass completed (or failed).

run_id.description: Identifier for the /audit4me-run invocation that produced this event. Format: run-{ISO8601-with-hyphens-instead-of-colons}-{4-char-random-suffix}. All events from one invocation share a run_id.

vendor.description: Vendor whose model produced this audit pass.

content_hash.description: Content hash of the file at the time of this audit pass.

outcome.description: completed: vendor returned a parseable response (findings may be zero). skipped: pre-checks failed (e.g., file type doesn't apply to category). failed: vendor errored or returned malformed output.

duration_ms.description: Wall-clock duration of the audit pass in milliseconds. Present for completed and failed; omitted for skipped.

findings.description: Number of findings produced by this pass. Present for completed outcomes; omitted otherwise.

tokens_in.description: Prompt tokens consumed. Present when known.

tokens_out.description: Completion tokens generated. Present when known.

cost_usd.description: Estimated cost in USD for this pass, computed from tokens × per-vendor pricing.

rules_version.description: rules_version active at the time of this pass.

failure_reason.description: Short failure reason when outcome=failed (e.g., 'codex_response_invalid', 'rate_limit', 'auth_error'). Omitted otherwise.
